CVE-2024-22049.title: httparty before 0.21.0 is vulnerable to an assumed-immutable web  ...
CVE-2024-22049.description: httparty before 0.21.0 is vulnerable to an assumed-immutable web parameter vulnerability. A remote and unauthenticated attacker can provide a crafted filename parameter during multipart/form-data uploads which could result in attacker controlled filenames being written.
